note: seq=69 (generic promoter v2 -- expanded name heuristics + fuzzy fallback + sweep 60). Adds ~25 more business-name column variants (current_entity_name [NY Active Corporations, millions], businessname [CCB/L&I], legal_business_name, facility_name, location_name, corp_name, ...) plus a FUZZY fallback (any column with a business token + 'name', excluding first/last/contact/geo names -> still firmographic, still skips person/lobbyist). Raises GEN_N_DATASETS 25->60 to sweep more of the 483 discovered datasets. Re-fetch+sha-verify+kick non-blocking; the 30-min timer continues. selftest PASS (incl. fuzzy cases: current_entity_name/businessname/company_name -> mapped; first_name+last_name -> rejected). Should flip several no_name_col goldmines to LIVE. Allowlist-safe; PG-safe (per-page commits, 1 conn).
